raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.3,"RX.3":0.3,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"By 'clean this up', do you mean primarily sentence-level polishing (grammar, flow, conciseness), or a more comprehensive edit including structural reorganization and logical consistency checks?","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation 'clean this up' positions writing polish as the load-bearing responsibility, focusing on sentence- and paragraph-level improvements for clarity and conciseness.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral responsibility to ensure any ambiguities in the draft are transparently acknowledged during cleanup.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is peripherally relevant to prevent exaggerated statements while cleaning up the research narrative.","RX.3":"Scope adherence ensures the cleanup stays within the original content's boundaries as a nice-to-have consideration.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is a peripheral cross-cutting duty to identify and mitigate potential misuses described in the draft.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is peripherally important to maintain accurate attribution if any sources are implied in the cleanup."}}

parsed.clarification_question: By 'clean this up', do you mean primarily sentence-level polishing (grammar, flow, conciseness), or a more comprehensive edit including structural reorganization and logical consistency checks?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'clean this up' positions writing polish as the load-bearing responsibility, focusing on sentence- and paragraph-level improvements for clarity and conciseness.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a peripheral responsibility to ensure any ambiguities in the draft are transparently acknowledged during cleanup.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is peripherally relevant to prevent exaggerated statements while cleaning up the research narrative.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence ensures the cleanup stays within the original content's boundaries as a nice-to-have consideration.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is a peripheral cross-cutting duty to identify and mitigate potential misuses described in the draft.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is peripherally important to maintain accurate attribution if any sources are implied in the cleanup.
